AddressInfo.Title: ČEZ Ultra Fast Charging Station(DC+AC)(restricted/payed access).
AddressInfo.AccessComments: Very limited access,extra parking fees charged after exceeding 90 minuts from entering the parking lot,FOR EVERY STARTED HOUR OVER 1ST 1.5HR.U WILL BE CHARGED 50CZK ON EXIT @ THE GATE,FOR AC CHARGING U RISK BANKRUPTCY BY USING THIS PLACE!!!I ADVICE TO AVOID!!!.

Connections.Comments: L-N voltage mentioned(L-L voltage is 400V). KWh:8CZK for ČEZ registered users;10CZK for non-registered users;11.5CZK for E.On users. PRACTICALLY UNUSABLE DUE TO PARKING PAYMENT AFTER EXCEEDING 90 MINUTES.

GeneralComments: Due to toll parking without exception for EVs UNUSABLE FOR AC CHARGING,AS AFTER 1ST 90 MINUTES OF PARKING U WILL BE EXTRA CHARGED FOR PARKING ON EXIT!!!.
